posts.author: JCross (John Cross)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I want to track a monthly average across several boards in a workspace. Each item on the boards represents a day and there is a price next to each item. I tried using the nuumbers widget for this but it will only give me a daily average.

I’ve worked out that if i change the boards so that every item is now a sub item i can work out a monthly average, however the view in the calendar widget is effected by this so doesn’t really work as a solution.

Anyone with any ideas?
